second_review_reason: Second review confirms that accession-level MDM2 elephant evidence is present, but the current captured evidence is UniProtKB TrEMBL/unreviewed and therefore insufficient by itself for a later reviewed ortholog decision
required_second_review_checks: capture stronger source evidence before any later reviewed decision PR; check reviewed UniProt, NCBI protein or gene records, Ensembl orthology, OMA, OrthoDB, or primary literature; record conflicts before any reviewed decision PR
forbidden_actions_after_second_review: ortholog acceptance; reviewed decision creation; Gate 4 or Gate 5 policy update; sequence fetch; Biohub call; embedding generation; Boltz call; AF3 call; Chai call; enrichment rerun; contrast rerun; Gate 8 promotion; Gate 9 promotion; biological claim
reviewer_note: First MDM2 elephant second-review decision fixture. G3SX30 remains an accession-level evidence candidate only; because the captured UniProtKB evidence is TrEMBL/unreviewed, stronger source evidence is required before any later reviewed decision PR.
